title: bauhinia brevicalyx
intro: Bauhinia brevicalyx, also known as the 'Red Bunga Raya', is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The plant is known to have health benefits including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Bauhinia brevicalyx is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction for medicinal use, with some herbal preparations also incorporating it into capsules or tinctures.
